cmd/link: make TestTypePlacement work on AIX  The existing code was just wrong. On AIX the go.type section is folded into the .text section (when internally linking), or the .data section (when externally linking). cmd/link: use correct alignment for type descriptors on AIX  CL 724261 changed the linker to put all type descriptors that are used for typelinks in a single list.
